commands.summary: User instructed Codex to continue gate-by-gate, not stop before full P7 completion, and to make professional corrections when design details are unreasonable while preserving the strongest-player quality target.

forbidden_files_checked: No implementation files created before this authorization evidence
No external workspace used for implementation
exit_criteria_covered: P7B implementation authorized after P7A evidence
not_verified_boundaries: Authorization does not waive evidence, tests, no-omission, or iron-gate requirements
authorization_scope: Proceed through P7A-P7H in C:/kivo video
Correct design issues only with evidence and documented rationale
Do not deliver until P7 is fully complete and verified
